title: Festival Vibe Tensor: Minimum-Act Rank Decomposition
strategies: mode-3 slab (one act per stage x timeslot) -> baseline rank a*b
best-axis slab -> rank min(a*b, a*c, b*c)
exact Tucker compression + core slab -> rank = product of two smallest multilinear ranks
search for a still-lower exact CP decomposition (open rank)
